MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patricia Turnage, Esq. 510-727-6752 for Plaintiff.
Audrey Smith, Esq. 650-685-9300 of Howie & Smith for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff argues, mental state. Defendant responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JENNIFER POZA's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Jennifer Poza's motion to quash is granted on the ground that plaintiff did not comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 474 by naming her as a Doe defendant. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
